name: Denji no Chichi
description: This unnamed man was the father of [Denji](https://anilist.co/character/130102/Denji). ~!When Denji was young he killed his father in self defense, as his father was in a drunken aggressive state and he feared for his life. His father's murder was ruled a suicide by the adults in Denji’s life as acknowledging his death as a murder would mean they would be unable to get any money from his death. After his death, Denji inherits his debt to the Yakuza.!~
